title: LUMEN — Design & Motion Studio
title_vi: LUMEN — Studio thiết kế & chuyển động
special: EFFECT SHOWCASE: custom cursor + magnetic buttons + split-text reveal + scroll-PINNED horizontal gallery + 3D tilt cards + scroll progress bar + scale-on-scroll. All vanilla/self-contained; degrades safely on touch + prefers-reduced-motion (gallery becomes a native swipe carousel).
summary: Motion-forward creative-studio showcase combining seven signature interactions: a custom cursor with magnetic buttons, split-text hero reveal, a scroll-pinned horizontal work gallery, 3D tilt service cards, a scroll progress bar, running marquee, and scale-on-scroll media.
summary_vi: Showcase studio sáng tạo nặng chuyển động, gom 7 tương tác đặc trưng: custom cursor + nút magnetic, hero split-text, gallery cuộn-ngang pinned theo scroll, thẻ dịch vụ tilt 3D, progress bar, marquee, media scale theo scroll.
